message.content: ```plantuml @startuml title CSE & Hosted Resources participant "Notebook AE" as NotebookAE participant "CSE" as CSE participant "StreetLight-AE-1\nLight-Container-1" as StreetLight1 participant "StreetLight-AE-2\nLight-Container-2" as StreetLight2 activate CSE note left of CSE: Steps\n1. Retrieve containers from both AEs\n2. Process data\n3. Send to Notebook AE (not shown)\n4. Repeat periodically alt Retrieve Containers CSE -> StreetLight1 : RETRIEVE \ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-1/Light-Container-1 activate StreetLight1 StreetLight1 --> CSE : Response deactivate StreetLight1 CSE -> StreetLight2 : RETRIEVE \ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-2/Light-Container-2 activate StreetLight2 StreetLight2 --> CSE : Response deactivate StreetLight2 end deactivate CSE note bottom of CSE: Periodic operation\n(e.g., every 5 minutes) @enduml ```
